title: Hormuz at the Brink: Why Trump’s Blockade Threat Could Upend the Global Economy Without Settling the War
standfirst: Donald Trump’s threat to blockade the Strait of Hormuz has transformed the Iran crisis from a regional conflict into a test of endurance with global consequences. Yet the warning may be easier to issue than to execute, and even a partial disruption could reverberate through energy markets, shipping lanes and inflation far beyond the Gulf.
